title: AI Performance Analytics Dashboard for SaaS

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Performance Analytics Dashboard for SaaS

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
	<g transform='translate(10,10)'>
		<rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='70' rx='10' fill='#090a0f' stroke='#B7D7CD' stroke-width='2'/>
		<text x='20' y='30' fill='#C06C88' font-size='20' font-weight='bold'>Performance Analytics</text>
		<rect x='10' y='80' width='30' height='20' fill='#C06C88' rx='5'/>
		<text x='50' y='110' fill='#C06C88' font-size='16'>Time Period</text>
		<g transform='translate(150,90)'>
			<rect x='0' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
			<text x='10' y='30' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='14'>Day</text>
			<line x1='90' y1='10' x2='90' y2='30' stroke='#B7D7CD' stroke-width='2'/>
			<line x1='90' y1='10' x2='110' y2='10' stroke='#B7D7CD' stroke-width='2'/>
			<rect x='110' y='0' width='20' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='5'/>
		</g>
		<rect x='220' y='80' width='30' height='20' fill='#C06C88' rx='5'/>
		<text x='260' y='110' fill='#C06C88' font-size='16'>Export Data</text>
		<rect x='330' y='80' width='30' height='20' fill='#C06C88' rx='5'/>
		<text x='370' y='110' fill='#C06C88' font-size='16'>Filter</text>
	</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must display performance metrics, trend analysis, and user engagement data

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Performance Analytics Dashboard for SaaS

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
